Argos & the Oracle of Apollo

Argos' Counsel

I hear the hidden string before the temple names it. Choose a trial, mortal listener.

Argos tilts upward for higher tones, downward for lower tones, and glows when your ear grows stronger.

The Aural Odyssey

Enter the temple of divine hearing.

Notes become omens, intervals become lyre paths, mistakes become tangled constellations, and Argos guides your ear through mythic trials.

The oracle speaks.
